name: JoAi: Open Integration Settings

description.en: Open the agent integration settings for a specific integration such as calendar.
description.de: Öffne die Agent-Integrations-Einstellungen für eine bestimmte Integration wie Kalender.
description.es: Open the agent integration settings for a specific integration such as calendar.
description.fr: Open the agent integration settings for a specific integration such as calendar.
description.ro: Open the agent integration settings for a specific integration such as calendar.
description.it: Open the agent integration settings for a specific integration such as calendar.

bot: Use this when the user wants to connect or configure a specific integration. For calendar setup, pass integration=calendar.

inputs.name: Integration
inputs.bot: Integration slug to open. Use calendar for appointment setup.
